title: Quick Five Spice Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry made with five spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is easy to prepare and can be ready in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the five spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and cooked rice.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
